---
title: "FACT: Person UI Wage"
subtitle: "Scripts for loading FACT Person UI Wage tables"
toc: true
number-sections: true
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  eval: false
---

# Load FACT Person UI Wage

```{r echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
cat("```sql\n")
writeLines(readLines("data model scripts/FACT Person UI Wage/DW RedShift - Load FACT Person UI Wage.sql"))
cat("```\n")
```
